recommendations.title: Lost on a Mountain in Maine
recommendations.overview: When twelve-year-old Donn Fendler gets tired of waiting for his father and brothers to join him on the summit of Maine's highest peak, he decides to find his own way back to camp. But Donn doesn't count on a fast-moving fog that obscures the path. He

recommendations.title: Everest
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the incredible events surrounding a treacherous attempt to reach the summit of the world's highest mountain, "Everest" documents the awe-inspiring journey of two different expeditions challenged beyond their limits by one of the fiercest

recommendations.title: The Summit
recommendations.overview: The Summit is a 2012 documentary film about the 2008 K2 disaster directed by Nick Ryan. It combines documentary footage with dramatized recreations of the events of the 2008 K2 disaster. On the way to and from the summit, eleven climbers died during

recommendations.title: Vertical Limit
recommendations.overview: Trapped near the summit of K2, the world's second-highest mountain, Annie Garrett radios to base camp for help. Brother Peter hears Annie's message and assembles a team to save her and her group before they succumb to K2's unforgiving elements. But,

recommendations.title: 14 Peaks: Nothing Is Impossible
recommendations.overview: In 2019, Nepalese mountain climber Nirmal “Nims” Purja set out to do the unthinkable by climbing the world’s fourteen highest summits in less than seven months. (The previous record was eight years). He called the effort “Project Possible 14/7” and s

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2
recommendations.overview: As the war between the Capitol and the districts reaches its peak, Katniss Everdeen embarks on a perilous mission to liberate Panem and confront President Snow. Joined by a team of trusted allies, she navigates deadly traps, shifting loyalties, and t

recommendations.title: Escape to Athena
recommendations.overview: During the World War II, the prisoners of a German camp in a Greek island are trying to escape. They not only want their freedom, but also seek an ineffable treasure hidden in a monastery at the summit of the island's mountain.

recommendations.title: Soulcatcher
recommendations.overview: A military contractor hired to seize a weapon that turns people into savage killers seeks revenge when his brother falls victim to the device.

recommendations.title: Conquest 1453
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father Murat II, young Mehmet II ascends to the Ottoman throne. After braving internal and external enemies, he decides to complete what he was destined to do: Conquer Constantinople.
